message:
✨ Add functional variant selector with URL-persisted state

- Create VariantSelector component that stores selected variant in
  URL params (?variant=...) so selection survives back/forward
- Create VariantPrice component that updates price display when
  variant changes
- Update AddToCartButton to read selected variant from URL and pass
  it to cart context
- Extend addItem in cart context to accept explicit variantId
- Unavailable variants shown as disabled with strikethrough

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
